rationale: Educ. Code §12.137 governs charter school facility-sharing for dropout recovery and adult education programs. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 12.137. CERTAIN CHARTER HOLDERS AUTHORIZED TO PROVIDE COMBINED SERVICES FOR CERTAIN ADULT AND HIGH SCHOOL DROPOUT RECOVERY PROGRAMS.
_note: No nexus between proposed homestead exemption increase and this charter school provision.
